# SCORE Business Model Canvas Template

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Business model canvas worksheet for mapping the concept, customer, value proposition, channels, revenue, costs, partners, activities, and resources.

## When to surface

The user has an idea but not a clear model, customer, revenue logic, or operating requirements.

## Key information

- ## BOSS Library tags
- score, template-or-tool
- ## Resource purpose
- Business model canvas worksheet for mapping the concept, customer, value proposition, channels, revenue, costs, partners, activities, and resources.
- ## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
- Use as the first concrete worksheet for a raw idea-stage entrepreneur before entity formation, branding spend, or a full business plan.
- ## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
